title: Claim
description: A governed knowledge claim with attributed source, confidence level, and provenance. Used in Layer 1 (Core Engine) and Layer 2 (Sovereign Knowledge Mode).

content.description: The substance of the claim in plain language

source_type.description: The category of source from which this claim originates

source_ref.description: A citation, URL, document reference, or attribution for the claim

confidence.description: The epistemic confidence level of this claim

status.description: The current lifecycle status of this claim

entered_by.description: Actor or agent that created this claim entry

entry_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this claim was entered

domain.description: Optional knowledge domain or category for this claim

knowledge_system.description: Optional: the cultural or epistemic tradition this claim belongs to (e.g., 'Ifá tradition', 'Western empirical science')

related_claims.description: IDs of related or linked claims

notes.description: Free-form notes or context about this claim
